accepted_stop_conditions: Missing required read-first files or mandatory checker scripts.
Forbidden path mutation required to proceed.
Unapproved package manager or random installer required.
winget/npm/pip/Python prerequisite route unsafe or unavailable.
Any approved Wave001 tool cannot be validated by fixtures.
Read-only command mutates repo again and cannot be contained safely.
scope_boundary: Controlled install/repair for Wave001 approved tools (UTILITIES_7_ZIP, MARKDOWNLINT_CLI, CHECK_JSONSCHEMA_CLI, YAMLLINT_CLI) + prerequisites (winget, Node/npm, Python/pip) only when missing/broken; evidence and reports under current REPORT_DIR; no unrelated systems.
touched_paths: IMPERIUM_NEW_GENERATION/MECHANICUS/ARSENAL/REGISTRY/** (only if existing structure supports truthful status update)
IMPERIUM_NEW_GENERATION/MECHANICUS/ARSENAL/CATEGORIES/**/capability_card.json (only if existing pattern requires receipt links/status fields)
forbidden_paths: any path outside IMPERIUM_NEW_GENERATION/MECHANICUS unless explicit checker dependency
